site_tagline: web development studio for product and data experiences, based in Berlin
landing_intro: Hi, I'm Bruno. I lead a trusted network of developers and designers to build web applications, data products, and digital experiences for teams that need reliable delivery.
about_p1: I lead a Berlin-based web development studio with expertise across full-stack engineering and data science. My background in political science and climate policy helps us turn complex domains into clear, useful products.
about_p2_prefix: We build applications and visualize complex data with modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks
about_p2_suffix: as well as Python and R for data analysis.
about_p3: Explore selected projects below to see how we deliver end-to-end, from discovery to implementation.
usp_title: Let me help you bring your vision to life
usp_p1: Whether you need a simple website, a complex web app, or stunning data visualizations, I'm here to help!
usp_p2: I stay your single point of contact and assemble the right specialist team for each project - from design and implementation to ongoing support.
usp_p3: Have an exciting project you would like to collaborate on? Let's chat!
contact_intro: Use the contact form or send me a message and I will be happy to further discuss your ideas with you.
form_success: Thanks! Your email has been sent
form_error: There was an error. Please send a message per email.
blog_meta: some thoughts on web development and other things
projects_meta: explore my recent works and the technologies I used to build them
seo_default_alt: logo of the website, a stylized parenthesis and the beginning of a closing tag (less than sign)
